name: Viking Acquisition Corp. II
business: Viking Acquisition Corp. II (VII) is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. As of the filing, the company has not selected any business combination target and has not initiated substantive discussions with any target. The company's management team and sponsor, KingsRock, will leverage their network to identify potential acquisition targets in industries where the team has expertise.
